overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a snowy forest trail at night. The character approaches a large bonfire in a clearing, stops to observe it, then continues walking away into the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with wooden fence and lamp posts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy trail past lamp posts

entered.detail: tall wooden lamp post with warm yellow light illuminating the snow
simple wooden fence running alongside the trail
narrow trail covered in snow with visible footprints
leafless trees lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snowy forest trail at night, passing wooden lamp posts that cast warm light on the snow. The path is lined with bare trees and a wooden fence, creating an enclosed, quiet atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy clearing with large bonfire ahead

events.description: large bonfire becomes visible in the distance ahead, illuminating the clearing

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bonfire visible ahead in the clearing

entered.detail: large teepee-style bonfire with flames flickering in the snowy clearing
rough wooden log placed as seating near the fire

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches a wide snowy clearing, a large bonfire becomes visible in the distance. The trail opens up and the lamp posts fade behind as the fire grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: campfire site with log benches in snowy clearing

events.description: character stops walking and stands before the bonfire
character begins circling around the bonfire to the right

agents.ego_description: approaching the bonfire, stopping to observe it, then walking around it

entered.detail: wooden supply crate or box near the edge of the clearing

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the large bonfire, stopping to observe the flames before circling around it. The fire illuminates the snowy clearing with warm orange light, revealing log benches and wooden crates arranged around the site.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail returning to darkness

events.description: character walks away from the bonfire back into the dark trail

agents.ego_description: walking away from the campfire into the darkness along the snowy path

entered.detail: lamp posts reappearing in the distance along the trail

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the campfire behind and walks back into the darkness of the forest trail. The warm firelight fades as the character returns to the dimly lit path, with lamp posts gradually becoming visible ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, snowy forest that opens into a brightly lit clearing before receding back into the shadows. It begins by trailing a character along a narrow path lined with bare trees and wooden fences, where lamp posts cast a soft, warm glow on the snow. As the character advances, the enclosed trail expands into a wide clearing, and the dim lamplight fades as a massive bonfire grows in the distance. The scene then centers on the character stopping to observe the towering flames, which illuminate surrounding log benches and wooden crates in a vivid orange light. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the warmth of the fire behind, drifting back into the darkness of the forest trail where distant lamp posts gradually reappear.
